Web search API for AI agents, providing: Web search API for AI agents, providing real-time web pages, images, and news.
Follow these steps to obtain your Bocha:
Follow these steps to obtain your Bocha API Key:

1. Visit [Bocha AI Open Platform](https://open.bochaai.com) and create an account.
2. Navigate to **API KEY Management** in the dashboard.
3. Copy your API key.
Filter results by time range. Defaults t: Filter results by time range. Defaults to no limit.
